name: Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.)
summary: Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.), together with its subsidiaries, provides commercial and Islamic banking products and services in Qatar and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Corporate Banking, Consumer Banking, Asset and Wealth Management, and International Banking. It offers personal banking products and services, such as current, savings, fixed deposit, and call-notice deposit accounts; credit, debit, and pre-paid cards; personal, top-up, vehicle, vehicle lease, and mortgage loans; insurance products, including life, salary continuation, critical illness, motor, mortgage, and travel insurance; asset management services; and mobile, Internet, ATM, SMS, and USSD banking services. The company also provides business banking products and services, including current, call, fixed deposit, and non-resident accounts; working capital, project, and vehicle loans; structured and project finance; transaction banking services; and credit cards. In addition, it offers financial institutions, treasury, investment banking, and advisory services; and brokerage and custody services. The company serves individuals and corporates, as well as high net worth customers. It operates a network of 1,045 branches and 4,391 ATMs. The company was formerly known as Qatar National Bank S.A.Q. and changed its name to Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.) in January 2016. Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.) was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Doha, Qatar.
